---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for nonce-cracker
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific about the interface, behavior, and any CLI flags or configuration options.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, why were they rejected?

## Use Case

Provide a concrete use case or example of how this feature would be used:

```bash
# Example command with the proposed feature
nonce-cracker run --new-flag value ...
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's scope (ECDSA key recovery)
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case for this feature
